name: Doug Stafford
subject: FWD: Put Rand on the ballot!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,** ** Not sure if you saw this message from Rand, but we need your help. To get Rand on the ballot in all 50 states, [we need to raise $750,000](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32192175:WxYFo-yBN:m:1:879035888:A3A5B6B3DA2C64F8942C43D3E1A50F53:r) \-- and we need to do it fast. **The mainstream media and the Washington machine would LOVE it if Rand didn't make it on the ballot. We cannot let that happen. ** Rand is the ONE candidate who's committed to fighting for liberty and limited government -- Americans in every state deserve a chance to cast a vote for him. Don't you agree?

[Check out the below message from Rand and help us reach our goal TODAY!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32192175:WxYFo-yBN:m:1:879035888:A3A5B6B3DA2C64F8942C43D3E1A50F53:r) In Liberty, Doug Stafford
> \---------- Forwarded message ----------
> From: **Rand Paul** <[info@randpaul2016.com](mailto:info@randpaul2016.com)>
> Date: Wed, Dec 9, 2015 at 3:35 PM
> Subject: Put me on the ballot
> To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Dear Patriot, **$2 million. ** It's a lot of money. But that's what some of my opponents are budgeting for state filing fees, signature gathering and delegate recruitment to ensure their names get on the ballot in all 50 states! Of course, I know they'd love to ensure my name never appears . . . **They 'd love it if the ONE candidate's name who's committed to fighting for liberty and limited government never appeared as a choice before the American people!** [Patriot, that's why I'm counting on you to help put my name on the ballot in all 50 states with your most generous contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32192176:WxYFo-yBN:m:1:879035888:A3A5B6B3DA2C64F8942C43D3E1A50F53:r). The good news is, while other candidates have to pay high-cost political pros to do this work for them because their stale Big Government messages don't excite anyone, grassroots patriots all over the country are spending long hours volunteering for my campaign. That means we should be able to complete this task for just a fraction of the cost of other campaigns. Of course, we still have to come up with the resources to pay exorbitant state filing fees - which can be as much as $40,000 in South Carolina. So my campaign has set a [$750,000 goal](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32192176:WxYFo-yBN:m:1:879035888:A3A5B6B3DA2C64F8942C43D3E1A50F53:r) for this critical project. **Sadly, we don't have much time.** **But I know we can meet this challenge if every one of my supporters is willing to chip in even a little**. Would you agree to help by chipping in [$2.00 or even $1.00 per state with a gift of $100 or $50.00?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32192176:WxYFo-yBN:m:1:879035888:A3A5B6B3DA2C64F8942C43D3E1A50F53:r) Or, if that's too much, would agree to $0.50 a state and [give $25](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32192177:WxYFo-yBN:m:1:879035888:A3A5B6B3DA2C64F8942C43D3E1A50F53:r)? Any amount you can give - [whether it's $100 or more, or even $50, $25 or $10 - will make a tremendous difference.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32192176:WxYFo-yBN:m:1:879035888:A3A5B6B3DA2C64F8942C43D3E1A50F53:r) Patriot, can I count on you right away? [Please help me reach our $750,000 goal!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32192176:WxYFo-yBN:m:1:879035888:A3A5B6B3DA2C64F8942C43D3E1A50F53:r) In Liberty, Rand Paul | | [GIVE $25 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32192175:WxYFo-yBN:m:1:879035888:A3A5B6B3DA2C64F8942C43D3E1A50F53:r)
---
[GIVE $50 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32192175:WxYFo-yBN:m:1:879035888:A3A5B6B3DA2C64F8942C43D3E1A50F53:r)
[GIVE $75 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32192178:WxYFo-yBN:m:1:879035888:A3A5B6B3DA2C64F8942C43D3E1A50F53:r)
[GIVE $100 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32192179:WxYFo-yBN:m:1:879035888:A3A5B6B3DA2C64F8942C43D3E1A50F53:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32192180:WxYFo-yBN:m:1:879035888:A3A5B6B3DA2C64F8942C43D3E1A50F53:r)

Paid for by Rand Paul for President
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Chris Christie
subject: Even better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Peter,
Mary Pat sent you the poll earlier this week that had us in 3rd, but just this morning there is a new WBUR poll that shows _our support has doubled since November_ and we are in 2nd place in New Hampshire!

**[Will you chip $2, $20 or even $200 to help us keep the momentum?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45333326:J21ooqLTN:m:1:1516426255:7A56F5BC99C4357C0038CF6ED617A1EA:r)**

I will continue to work hard, answer the tough questions from voters and by now you know I will not give up until that second place turns into first.

Let's do this.
Chris
****

****
****
****

---
| |
---|---|---
| | Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc.
---

Contributions to Chris Christie for President, Inc. are not tax deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

You can view this email in your web browser [**here**](https://email.vervemail.com/p/vJ21ooqLTN).

P.O. Box 9119
Morristown, NJ 07963
(973) 936-9318
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com
**You can unsubscribe instantly[here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/oJ21ooqLTN)**.
| |

name: Meredith Gibbons, EricGreitens.com
subject: Extended
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
I wanted to make sure you saw the email below, and pass on some
really awesome news. The donor match below was so successful,
that the donor has agreed to extend his 5X match until the end of
today. So far we have raised $2,620 on 70 small donations --
since it's being matched that means we have raised $15,720! Will
you chip in $10 to help continue our momentum?
https://ericgreitens.nationbuilder.com/donor_match_extended

I will send the final number and report to our donor tonight at
11pm. I hope your investment is included. Join today by investing
$10 which will turn into $60 for the campaign.

It is crucial that you take action now and we capitalize on this
HUGE opportunity.
https://ericgreitens.nationbuilder.com/donor_match_extended

Meredith Gibbons
Finance Director

------------

Subject: Exciting News
Date: December 10, 2015

BIG news! For the next 24 hours, we have a donor who is willing
to 5x match EVERY online donation to our campaign. That means if
you give $5 right now, it turns into $30 - your $5 plus their
$25!

If you invest now, it will have 5 times the impact. Will you help
us and capitalize on this HUGE opportunity?
https://ericgreitens.nationbuilder.com/donor_match_extended

Quick Donate $10 Now (turns into $60) >>

We're really relying on your grassroots support to be successful.

Please take advantage of this donor match - the donor is only
doing this for the next 24 hours. It is crucial that you take
action now.
https://ericgreitens.nationbuilder.com/donor_match_extended

name: Ben Carson
subject: [URGENT] This is a very alarming report:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32200481:WHGqJ-yNU:m:1:876315805:79DA936A3B4093E71D7959849B168997:r)
---

Peter,

There's a very alarming report in _The Washington Post_ today that you need to be aware of.

Apparently GOP bosses in Washington met to plan for the possibility of a brokered convention and how best to alter the outcome if Republican voters choose a nominee they don't like.

I pray this is incorrect and not the beginning of a plan to subvert the will of the people and replace it with the will of the political elite. **That would be wrong and I will not stand for it.

****So here's my promise to you. As your President I will not rest until power in America is restored to its rightful place -- in the hands of individual citizens like you.**

[**If you stand with me, I need your support. Today. Now more than ever, I need you to invest in this campaign by making a secure donation of any amount.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32200481:WHGqJ-yNU:m:1:876315805:79DA936A3B4093E71D7959849B168997:r)

**It's clear the political class cannot be trusted. It's time for a change in Washington.

**With your help, I intend to be the Republican nominee. If I am not, I'm prepared to lose fair and square and the winner will have my full support. But I will not sit back and watch a theft.

For many years, the professional political class in both parties has deceived and manipulated the American people. Too often, our leaders seem more concerned with their own survival than the survival of America. "They the Powerful" have trampled upon "We the People" and it's time for us to stand up and restore the balance.

This is a difficult but worthy undertaking, and it will require us to work together side by side.

**I**** am both blessed and emboldened to know that you are standing with me, but I can only be successful if you are willing to invest in this campaign. [So I ask you, right now, to make a donation of any amount. Even if it's just $5, it will go a long way.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32200481:WHGqJ-yNU:m:1:876315805:79DA936A3B4093E71D7959849B168997:r)**

Thank you for your steadfast support. Together, we will get our country on the right track and restore Abraham Lincoln's vision of a government of, by and for the people.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32200481:WHGqJ-yNU:m:1:876315805:79DA936A3B4093E71D7959849B168997:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32200482:WHGqJ-yNU:m:1:876315805:79DA936A3B4093E71D7959849B168997:r)
---
|
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32200483:WHGqJ-yNU:m:1:876315805:79DA936A3B4093E71D7959849B168997:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32200484:WHGqJ-yNU:m:1:876315805:79DA936A3B4093E71D7959849B168997:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32200485:WHGqJ-yNU:m:1:876315805:79DA936A3B4093E71D7959849B168997:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32200486:WHGqJ-yNU:m:1:876315805:79DA936A3B4093E71D7959849B168997:r)
---|---|---|---

name: Rand Paul
subject: Phone for Liberty Bracket Challenge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

With 53 days until voting begins, I am
challenging Congressmen Justin Amash, Raúl Labrador, Cynthia
Lummis, Thomas Massie, and Mick Mulvaney to build teams of
dedicated supporters who will compete against each other in my
Phone from Home Challenge.

Each Congressman will lead a team of super
volunteers and compete to see who can make the most phone calls
for my campaign. Every week for the next month, the team that
makes the least number of calls will be eliminated until we are
left with a winner.

In addition to bragging rights around the
Capitol, the team that makes the most calls will win exclusive
prizes from the campaign.

Will you join this crucial Phone from Home
Challenge? To sign up, visit randpaul.com/phoneliberty to join
the team of your favorite Congressman. You will receive a
follow-up email from the Congressman who wants you on his winning
team on Sunday. The competition kicks off this Monday!

It's crucial that we reach as many early
state voters as possible in these remaining weeks. I'm counting
on you to make a difference and lead your team to victory.

Sign up HERE today to add your name to my
growing list of supporters.

In Liberty,
Rand

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWEW7f-yNc

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWEW7f-yNc

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Mike DuHaime
subject: Christie climbs to second place in New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
|
---
| |
---|---
|
| | | Two polls have come out this week that show the real, consistent progress Governor Christie is having on the ground in New Hampshire. Just this morning, WBUR released their New Hampshire poll showing support for Governor Christie has doubled in the last month and has him moving up to second place. He had the largest increase in support from their last poll and is now ahead of Senator Rubio, Senator Cruz, Governor Bush, Governor Kasich and others in this latest poll, only trailing Donald Trump. **[Politico - Poll: Chris Christie surges in New Hampshire](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45338153:6ORIWqLNk:m:1:1516426255:5DDAC2CD623CA512EC0A2F37EE8022F6:r)** CNN/WMUR released a poll earlier this week which showed Governor Christie moving up to third place in New Hampshire. He is ahead of Governor Bush, Governor Kasich, Ben Carson, Carly Fiorina, and Senator Paul. His fav/unfav among Republicans in New Hampshire is 59/30 (+29). This is Governor Christie's highest favorability rating in the WMUR poll since July 2013. These new polls prove Governor Christie is trending in the right direction as we head into the final stretch of the primary in New Hampshire. Governor Christie has also had a series of endorsements from influential leaders and activists across the state. State Senator Jeb Bradley [endorsed Christie on Monday morning](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45338154:6ORIWqLNk:m:1:1516426255:5DDAC2CD623CA512EC0A2F37EE8022F6:r) citing his courage to tackle tough issues and his strong leadership on fighting terrorism. House Speaker Pro Tempore Sherm Packard and Majority Leader Dick Hinch Endorse Christie for President calling him "the president we need in these challenging times." And adding to our strong leadership team, [Governor Christie received the endorsement of State Senator Jerry Little](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45338155:6ORIWqLNk:m:1:1516426255:5DDAC2CD623CA512EC0A2F37EE8022F6:r) yesterday morning. Governor Christie heads back to New Hampshire today for two more town hall meetings. And next Saturday, Governor Christie will kick-off a four day bus tour across the state with a few special guests. Stay tuned. Mike
---

name: Katie McGinty
subject: Happening right now
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
**_The Morning Call:_ "Even though Toomey is distancing himself from the event... he still stands to benefit as he faces re-election in 2016"**
[**Make a $5 donation to Katie right now >> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8960439116860751872/-3184305520806723584?refcode=e20151211&refcode2=e20151211nd&amount=5)
Friend --

Right now, **Donald Trump is taking the stage at a big fundraiser for Pennsylvania Republicans, raising cash to directly benefit Pat Toomey 's campaign.**

Thousands of people across the country stood with me to demand Toomey cancel today's fundraiser, or accept that he owns Trump's hateful speech and every dollar that is raised from it. But Toomey's response? _Nothing_.

Today Trump is going to bring in thousands of additional dollars that tomorrow will directly benefit Pat Toomey's campaign.

**[Can you help me compete? Our campaign needs to raise $10,000 by midnight tonight to offset the additional funds that Trump will bring in for Pat Toomey's reelection. Chip in $5 now to help us out.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8960439116860751872/-3184305520806723584?refcode=e20151211&refcode2=e20151211nd&amount=5)**

As I told you earlier this week, Pat Toomey has told the media that he has a "scheduling conflict" and won't be able to attend today's fundraiser, but we know that he's just trying to pull a fast one. **Pat Toomey doesn 't want to be seen in the same room as Donald Trump because he doesn't want to admit that he is profiting from Trump's hateful rhetoric.** That won't stop him from taking the money Trump helps raise though.

**[I KNOW that the positive power of our grassroots supporters can raise more than the hateful rhetoric of the Donald Trumps and Pat Toomeys of this world. Prove it now with a $5 contribution to help us reach our $10,000 goal by midnight tonight.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8960439116860751872/-3184305520806723584?refcode=e20151211&refcode2=e20151211nd&amount=5)**

Thanks for standing by me and supporting my campaign.

Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8960439116860751872/-3184305520806723584?refcode=e20151211&refcode2=e20151211nd&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8960439116860751872/-3256363114844651520).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Team Van Hollen
subject: Need you on this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| | **BREAKING: AP: Van Hollen: Ban Gun Sales to Those on FBI Terrorist List**
[**ADD YOUR NAME: Stand with Chris on this Important Issue**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c32/70cdc2ba/47bded47/3964d19/1358042604/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2In0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/ban-gun-sales-to-terrorists?source=em121015_Gun&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME+Stand+with+Chris+on+this+I&utm_campaign=em121015_Gun")
---

Friend,

In the wake of continuing gun massacres and the daily toll of gun violence across America, we have all been angered by Republicans in Congress who refuse to take even the smallest step to prevent gun violence and keep our communities safe.

In fact, just this past week, Republicans repeatedly blocked a common sense proposal that would prevent individuals on the FBI's terrorist watch list from purchasing guns. It seems there is no end to the GOP's loyalty to the NRA.

Our fight is not over. As the AP reported last night, "Maryland Rep. Chris Van Hollen is urging Gov. Larry Hogan to 'explore every possible state action' to stop gun sales to dangerous individuals, particularly those on the FBI Terrorist Watchlist."

**[Stand with Chris on this important issue.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c32/70cdc2ba/47bded47/3964d16/1358042604/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2In0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/ban-gun-sales-to-terrorists?source=em121015_Gun&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Stand+with+Chris+on+this+important+issue&utm_campaign=em121015_Gun")**

Our state has led the country before on efforts to reduce gun violence, and we can do it again now.

[**Sign our petition to show you support Chris and his effort to keep Maryland families safe.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c32/70cdc2ba/47bded47/3964d17/1358042604/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2In0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/ban-gun-sales-to-terrorists?source=em121015_Gun&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Sign+our+petition+to+show+you+support+Ch&utm_campaign=em121015_Gun")

Thank you for your help on this urgent matter.

Team Van Hollen

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c32/70cdc2ba/47bded47/3964d14/1358042604/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em121015_Gun&source=em121015_Gun") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
